title: Consistency Training while Mitigating Obfuscation via Rate Matching
summary: Consistency Training while Mitigating Obfuscation via Rate Matching
whyItMatters: Sohaib Imran, Prakhar Gupta, Jannes Elstner, David Demitri Africa Links:   Paper | Code   TL;DR.   Models condition their behavior on extraneous input features in undesirable ways — for example, on evaluation-likeness (resulting in evaluation gaming), or on the user's preferred answer (resulting in sycophancy).
